## Checklist

- [ ] `plugin.json` version matches `marketplace.json` version
- [ ] Skill has a clear description and trigger conditions
- [ ] I've tested the skill/command in Claude Code or Cowork
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if adding a new plugin)
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` updated (if changing release process)
